title: Track Blood Units with ABO/Rh Type and Collection Date
description: The system shall store the ABO/Rh type and collection date for each blood unit received.
rationale: This requirement is necessary to achieve full inventory management, ensuring that all relevant details about each blood unit are recorded and easily accessible.
business_value: Improves inventory accuracy and efficiency, facilitating better resource allocation and reducing waste.

source.description: As a blood bank manager I need to track blood units with ABO/Rh type and collection date So that I can achieve full inventory management.

acceptance_criteria: The unit is added to the inventory with the provided details
I can view all tracked units in the inventory
preconditions: A new blood unit is received
functional_constraints: The system must store at least ABO/Rh type and collection date for each blood unit.
edge_cases: Handling of blood units with missing ABO/Rh type or collection date
Recording of duplicate blood unit IDs

interfaces.name: Inventory Management API
interfaces.description: The system will use this API to add new blood units and retrieve all tracked units.

test_cases.description: Adding a new blood unit with ABO/Rh type and collection date
test_cases.expected_result: The system successfully adds the blood unit to the inventory with the provided details.

test_cases.description: Viewing all tracked units in the inventory
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays a list of all tracked blood units, including their ABO/Rh type and collection date.

test_cases.description: Handling of missing ABO/Rh type during unit addition
test_cases.expected_result: The system rejects the input with an error message indicating that the ABO/Rh type is required.
